# tf_module_push_oci

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Push modules to OCI registries.

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tf_module_push_oci")

tf_module_push_oci(
    name = "push_oci",
    srcs = [":my_module"],
    image = "ghcr.io/my-org/my-module",
    registry = "ghcr.io",
)
```

See [Publishing Overview](README.md) for more information.
